zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Rohaut於1318年1月1日出生在英國戴文莫德波利時，她的父親Sir Roger Rohaut14歲，母親Eleanor Lovel11歲。她於大約1334年與Thomas Champernoun在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1369年5月在英國英格蘭戴文莫德波利享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Rohaut于1318年1月1日出生在英国戴文莫德波利时，她的父亲Sir Roger Rohaut14岁，母亲Eleanor Lovel11岁。她于大约1334年与Thomas Champernoun在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1369年5月在英国英格兰戴文莫德波利享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Rohaut was born on 1 January 1318, in Modbury, Devon, England, her father, Sir Roger Rohaut, was 14 and her mother, Eleanor Lovel, was 11. She married Thomas Champernoun about 1334, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in May 1369, in Modbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, En: Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Rohaut est née le 1 janvier 1318, à Modbury, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Rohaut, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Lovel, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Champernoun environ 1334, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en mai 1369, à Modbury, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, En: Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Rohaut am 1. Januar 1318 in Modbury, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger Rohaut 14 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Lovel 11. Sie hat um 1334 in Cornwall, England Thomas Champernoun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Mai 1369 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Modbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Rohaut è nata il il 1 gennaio 1318 nel Modbury, Devon, England, sua padre, Sir Roger Rohaut, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Lovel, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Champernoun circa 1334, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1369, nel Modbury, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Rohautが1318年1月1日にイギリスデボンモドブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Rohautは14歳，母Eleanor Lovelは11歳であった。約1334年にイギリスコルンワルでThomas Champernounと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1369年5月にイギリスイギリスデボンモドブリーで51歳で死去した。

ko.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, En: 영국 데폰 버 페레르스 위스 버 알스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Rohaut(이)가 1318년 1월 1일 영국 데폰 모드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger Rohaut(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Lovel(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 대략 1334년 영국 코른월에서 Thomas Champernoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 5월 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 모드버이에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Rohaut nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1318, em Modbury, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Rohaut, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Lovel, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Champernoun aproximadamente 1334, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em maio de 1369, em Modbury, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, En: бир фиррирс вит бир алстон, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Rohaut родилась 1 января 1318 г. в местности модбури, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Roger Rohaut было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Lovel, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Champernoun около 1334 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла май 1369 г. в местности модбури, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Rohaut nació el 1 de enero de 1318, en Modbury, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger Rohaut, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Eleanor Lovel, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Thomas Champernoun aproximadamente 1334, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1369, en Modbury, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años.
